---
title: "Simulation_Alternate"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-14"
---

# Libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(spatstat.geom)
library(spatstat.random)
library(spatstat.explore)
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
```

# T-Cells and NK Cells

```{r}
# --------------------------------------------------
# TREE_MAP
#
# Purpose:
# This table defines the biological hierarchy for each
# terminal cell subtype in the simulation.
#
# Idea:
# Each simulated cell is usually stored using its most
# specific label only, e.g. "CD4_T" or "Naive_B".
#
# This mapping table tells us which larger families that
# subtype belongs to.
#
# For example:
#   CD4_T -> T -> Lymphoid -> Immune -> Hematopoietic
#
# Why this is useful:
# 1. It avoids repeating the full lineage in every row
#    of the simulated dataset.
# 2. It lets us recover higher-level groupings later
#    using a join.
# 3. It helps define the hierarchy used for multiple
#    testing methods such as TreeBH, DART, and p-filter.
#
# How to use it:
# Suppose your simulated cells look like this:
#   x, y, cellType_sub
#
# Then you can attach the hierarchy with:
#
#   cells <- cells %>%
#     left_join(TREE_MAP, by = c("cellType_sub" = "subtype"))
#
# After joining, each cell can also carry:
TREE_MAP <- tribble(
  ~subtype,      ~major,      ~lineage,
  "Naive_B",     "B",         "Lymphoid",
  "Memory_B",    "B",         "Lymphoid",
  "CD4_T",       "T",         "Lymphoid",
  "CD8_T",       "T",         "Lymphoid",
  "Memory_T",    "T",         "Lymphoid",
  "NK",          "NK",        "Lymphoid",
  "Monocyte",    "Monocyte",  "Myeloid",
  "M1_like",     "Macrophage","Myeloid",
  "M2_like",     "Macrophage","Myeloid",
  "Neutrophil",  "Granulocyte","Myeloid",
  "Eosinophil",  "Granulocyte","Myeloid",
  "Basophil",    "Granulocyte","Myeloid",
  "cDC1",        "Dendritic", "Myeloid",
  "cDC2",        "Dendritic", "Myeloid",
  "pDC",         "Dendritic", "Myeloid",
  "Mast",        "Mast",      "Myeloid",
  "Fibroblast",  "Stromal",   "Stromal",
  "Endothelial", "Stromal",   "Stromal",
  "Pericyte",    "Stromal",   "Stromal",
  "Epithelial",  "Tissue",    "Tissue"
)

# --------------------------------------------------
# safe_bw_diggle()
#
# Purpose:
# Compute a kernel bandwidth for a point pattern using
# bw.diggle(), with a configurable upper search limit.
#
# Input:
#   pp   = spatstat point pattern (ppp)
#   hmax = maximum bandwidth allowed
#
# Output:
#   numeric bandwidth value sigma
# --------------------------------------------------
safe_bw_diggle <- function(pp, hmax = 300) {
  sigma <- bw.diggle(pp, hmax = hmax)
  sigma
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# choose_anchor_n()
#
# Purpose:
# Choose the number of anchor points used to generate
# a spatial density for a branch.
#
# Idea:
# Anchor count is proportional to the final cell count
# but constrained between min_n and max_n.
#
# Input:
#   n_final = final cell count
#   min_n   = minimum anchor points
#   scale   = proportion of n_final
#   max_n   = maximum anchor points
#
# Output:
#   integer-like anchor count
# --------------------------------------------------
choose_anchor_n <- function(n_final, min_n = 40, scale = 0.35, max_n = 250) {
  max(min_n, min(max_n, round(n_final * scale)))
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# split_count()
#
# Purpose:
# Split a total count n into integer subgroup counts
# according to given proportions.
#
# Idea:
# Floor the proportional counts and distribute the
# remainder to the groups with the largest decimals.
#
# Input:
#   n     = total count
#   props = vector of proportions
#   names = optional names for output groups
#
# Output:
#   integer vector summing to n
# --------------------------------------------------
split_count <- function(n, props, names = NULL) {
  raw <- n * props
  out <- floor(raw)
  remainder <- n - sum(out)

  if (remainder > 0) {
    add_ix <- order(raw - out, decreasing = TRUE)[seq_len(remainder)]
    out[add_ix] <- out[add_ix] + 1
  }

  if (!is.null(names)) names(out) <- names
  out
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# normalize_im()
#
# Purpose:
# Convert a spatial image into a proper probability density
# so that it can be used safely in rpoint().
# --------------------------------------------------
normalize_im <- function(im_obj) {
  total_mass <- integral.im(im_obj)
  
  if (!is.finite(total_mass) || total_mass <= 0) {
    stop("Image cannot be normalized because total mass is not positive.")
  }
  
  im_obj / total_mass
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# label_cells()
#
# Purpose:
# Convert a spatstat point pattern into a tibble and
# assign a leaf cell type label.
#
# Inputs:
#   pp           = spatstat point pattern (ppp object)
#   cell_subtype = most specific cell label
#
# Output:
#   tibble with x, y, cellType_sub
# --------------------------------------------------
label_cells <- function(pp, cell_subtype) {
  if (!inherits(pp, "ppp")) {
    stop("pp must be a spatstat point pattern object of class 'ppp'.")
  }
  
  tibble(
    x = pp$x,
    y = pp$y,
    cellType_sub = cell_subtype
  )
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# add_tree_labels()
#
# Purpose:
# Use TREE_MAP to recover broader hierarchy labels
# from the leaf subtype label.
#
# Inputs:
#   cells    = tibble with a column called cellType_sub
#   tree_map = lookup table mapping subtype to hierarchy
#
# Output:
#   tibble with hierarchy columns added
# --------------------------------------------------
add_tree_labels <- function(cells, tree_map = TREE_MAP) {
  if (!"cellType_sub" %in% colnames(cells)) {
    stop("cells must contain a column called 'cellType_sub'.")
  }
  
  out <- cells %>%
    left_join(tree_map, by = c("cellType_sub" = "subtype"))
  
  missing_types <- out %>%
    filter(is.na(major) | is.na(lineage)) %>%
    distinct(cellType_sub) %>%
    pull(cellType_sub)
  
  if (length(missing_types) > 0) {
    stop(
      paste(
        "These subtypes are missing from TREE_MAP:",
        paste(missing_types, collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }
  
  out
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# simulate_cells_from_density()
#
# Purpose:
# Simulate n cells from a spatial density and label them
# with a leaf subtype.
#
# Inputs:
#   n            = number of cells
#   cell_subtype = leaf cell label
#   density      = spatstat image
#   win          = simulation window
#
# Output:
#   tibble with x, y, cellType_sub
# --------------------------------------------------
simulate_cells_from_density <- function(n, cell_subtype, density, win) {
  if (n <= 0) return(NULL)
  
  d <- normalize_im(density)
  pp <- rpoint(n = n, f = d, win = win)
  
  label_cells(pp, cell_subtype)
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# simulate_mixture_cells()
#
# Purpose:
# Simulate n cells from a mixture of two densities and
# label them with a leaf subtype.
#
# Inputs:
#   n            = number of cells
#   cell_subtype = leaf cell label
#   density1     = first density
#   density2     = second density
#   weight       = mixing weight in [0, 1]
#   win          = simulation window
#
# Output:
#   tibble with x, y, cellType_sub
# --------------------------------------------------
simulate_mixture_cells <- function(n, cell_subtype,
                                   density1, density2, weight, win) {
  if (n <= 0) return(NULL)
  
  if (!is.numeric(weight) || length(weight) != 1 || weight < 0 || weight > 1) {
    stop("weight must be a single number between 0 and 1.")
  }
  
  d1 <- normalize_im(density1)
  d2 <- normalize_im(density2)
  
  mixed_density <- (1 - weight) * d1 + weight * d2
  pp <- rpoint(n = n, f = mixed_density, win = win)
  
  label_cells(pp, cell_subtype)
}

# -------------------------------------------------- 
# simulate_pp() 
# 
# Purpose: 
# Simulate a completely spatially random point pattern 
# inside a given window.
# 
# Idea: 
# This uses a homogeneous Poisson point process, meaning: 
# - points are placed independently of one another 
# - every location in the window is equally likely 
# - there is no clustering or repulsion 
# 
# The intensity is chosen so that the expected total number # of points in the window is n. 
# 
# Inputs: 
# n = desired expected number of points 
# win = spatstat window object defining the simulation region 
# 
# Output: 
# A tibble with one row per simulated point, containing: 
# x, y = simulated spatial coordinates 
# 
# Notes: 
# - The number of simulated points is random, not fixed exactly at n 
# - The actual number of points is Poisson distributed with mean n 
# - This is a useful null model for complete spatial randomness 
# -------------------------------------------------- 

simulate_pp <- function(n, win) { 
  rpoispp(n / area.owin(win), win = win) 
}

# --------------------------------------------------
# resimulate_celltype_with_mixture()
#
# Purpose:
# Post hoc resimulate one cell subtype using a mixture of:
#   1. its own realized density
#   2. another cell subtype's realized density
#
# This lets you introduce an artificial spatial signal
# after all_cells has already been constructed.
#
# Inputs:
#   all_cells     = full tibble of simulated cells
#   target_type   = subtype to remove and resimulate
#   partner_type  = one or more subtype labels whose
#                   density will be mixed in
#   weight        = mixture weight for partner density
#   win           = spatstat window
#   keep_metadata = if TRUE, preserve extra metadata
#                   columns such as sample_id, condition
#
# Output:
#   updated tibble with target_type resimulated
# --------------------------------------------------
resimulate_celltype_with_mixture <- function(
  all_cells,
  target_type,
  partner_type,
  weight,
  win,
  keep_metadata = TRUE
) {
  if (!all(c("x", "y", "cellType_sub") %in% colnames(all_cells))) {
    stop("all_cells must contain columns: x, y, cellType_sub")
  }

  if (!is.character(target_type) || length(target_type) != 1) {
    stop("target_type must be a single subtype name.")
  }

  if (!is.character(partner_type) || length(partner_type) < 1) {
    stop("partner_type must be one or more subtype names.")
  }

  if (!is.numeric(weight) || length(weight) != 1 || weight < 0 || weight > 1) {
    stop("weight must be a single number between 0 and 1.")
  }

  target_cells <- all_cells %>%
    filter(cellType_sub == target_type)

  partner_cells <- all_cells %>%
    filter(cellType_sub %in% partner_type)

  remaining_cells <- all_cells %>%
    filter(cellType_sub != target_type)

  if (nrow(target_cells) == 0) {
    stop(paste("No cells found for target_type:", target_type))
  }

  if (nrow(partner_cells) == 0) {
    stop(
      paste(
        "No cells found for partner_type:",
        paste(partner_type, collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }

  # Convert realized cells into point patterns
  target_pp <- ppp(
    x = target_cells$x,
    y = target_cells$y,
    window = win
  )

  partner_pp <- ppp(
    x = partner_cells$x,
    y = partner_cells$y,
    window = win
  )

  # Estimate realized densities using safe_bw_diggle()
  target_density <- density.ppp(
    target_pp,
    sigma = safe_bw_diggle(target_pp)
  )

  partner_density <- density.ppp(
    partner_pp,
    sigma = safe_bw_diggle(partner_pp)
  )

  # Resimulate the target cell type from the mixture
  target_cells_new <- simulate_mixture_cells(
    n = nrow(target_cells),
    cell_subtype = target_type,
    density1 = target_density,
    density2 = partner_density,
    weight = weight,
    win = win
  )

  # Rebuild dataset
  out <- bind_rows(
    remaining_cells %>% select(x, y, cellType_sub),
    target_cells_new
  ) %>%
    add_tree_labels()

  # Reattach metadata if needed
  if (keep_metadata) {
    meta_cols <- setdiff(
      colnames(all_cells),
      c("x", "y", "cellType_sub", "major", "lineage")
    )

    if (length(meta_cols) > 0) {
      meta_template <- all_cells %>%
        select(all_of(meta_cols))

      meta_template <- meta_template[1, , drop = FALSE]

      out <- bind_cols(
        out,
        meta_template[rep(1, nrow(out)), , drop = FALSE]
      )
    }
  }

  out
}


# --------------------------------------------------
# make_realistic_counts()
#
# Purpose:
# Generate realistic cell counts across the hierarchy
# from a chosen total number of cells.
#
# Idea:
# Split the total count step by step through the tree:
# top level, major branches, then leaf subtypes.
#
# Input:
#   total_cells = total number of cells to simulate
#
# Output:
#   list containing counts for each level of the
#   hierarchy, including final leaf cell counts
# --------------------------------------------------
make_realistic_counts <- function(total_cells = 5000) {

  top <- split_count(
    total_cells,
    props = c(Immune = 0.45, Stromal = 0.25, Tissue = 0.30)
  )

  immune <- split_count(
    top["Immune"],
    props = c(Lymphoid = 0.55, Myeloid = 0.45)
  )

  lymphoid <- split_count(
    immune["Lymphoid"],
    props = c(B = 0.20, T = 0.65, NK = 0.15)
  )

  b_branch <- split_count(
    lymphoid["B"],
    props = c(Naive_B = 0.70, Memory_B = 0.30)
  )

  t_branch <- split_count(
    lymphoid["T"],
    props = c(CD4_T = 0.45, CD8_T = 0.35, Memory_T = 0.20)
  )

  myeloid <- split_count(
    immune["Myeloid"],
    props = c(
      Monocyte = 0.20,
      Macrophage = 0.25,
      Granulocyte = 0.25,
      Dendritic = 0.20,
      Mast = 0.10
    )
  )

  macrophage <- split_count(
    myeloid["Macrophage"],
    props = c(M1_like = 0.45, M2_like = 0.55)
  )

  granulocyte <- split_count(
    myeloid["Granulocyte"],
    props = c(Neutrophil = 0.70, Eosinophil = 0.20, Basophil = 0.10)
  )

  dendritic <- split_count(
    myeloid["Dendritic"],
    props = c(cDC1 = 0.30, cDC2 = 0.45, pDC = 0.25)
  )

  stromal <- split_count(
    top["Stromal"],
    props = c(Fibroblast = 0.50, Endothelial = 0.30, Pericyte = 0.20)
  )

  tissue <- c(Epithelial = top["Tissue"])

  leaf_counts <- c(
    b_branch,
    t_branch,
    NK = lymphoid["NK"],
    Monocyte = myeloid["Monocyte"],
    macrophage,
    granulocyte,
    dendritic,
    Mast = myeloid["Mast"],
    stromal,
    tissue
  )

  list(
    total_cells = total_cells,
    top = top,
    immune = immune,
    lymphoid = lymphoid,
    myeloid = myeloid,
    leaf = leaf_counts
  )
}

```

# Let us Begin

```{text}
Heimatopetic
├── Immune
│   ├── Lymphoid
│   │   ├── B
│   │   │   ├── Naive_B
│   │   │   └── Memory_B
│   │   │ 
│   │   ├── T
│   │   │   ├── CD4_T
│   │   │   ├── CD8_T
│   │   │   └── Memory_T
│   │   │   
│   │   └── NK
│   └── Myeloid
│       ├── Monocyte
│       ├── Macrophage
│       │   ├── M1_like
│       │   └── M2_like
│       ├── Granulocyte
│       │   ├── Neutrophil
│       │   ├── Eosinophil
│       │   └── Basophil
│       ├── Dendritic
│       │   ├── cDC1
│       │   ├── cDC2
│       │   └── pDC
│       └── Mast
├── Stromal
│   ├── Fibroblast
│   ├── Endothelial
│   └── Pericyte
└── Tissue
    └── Epithelial
```

```{r}
# Setting up the window
WIN <- owin(c(0, 1000), c(0, 1000))

# Main Density
main_pp <- simulate_pp(1000, WIN)
main_density <- density.ppp(main_pp, safe_bw_diggle(main_pp))

```

## Immune Layer
```{r}
immune_pp <- rpoint(n = 250, f = normalize_im(main_density), win = WIN)
immune_density <- density.ppp(immune_pp, safe_bw_diggle(immune_pp))

# Lympoid Density
lymphoid_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(immune_density), win = WIN)
lymphoid_density <- density.ppp(lymphoid_pp, safe_bw_diggle(lymphoid_pp))

# Myeloid Density
myeloid_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(immune_density), win = WIN)
myeloid_density <- density.ppp(myeloid_pp, safe_bw_diggle(myeloid_pp))
```
### Lymphoid Branch
  
```{r}
# ===================================
# Lymphoid Branch
# ===================================

# B-Cell Branch
b_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(lymphoid_density), win=WIN)
b_density <- density.ppp(b_pp, safe_bw_diggle(b_pp))

naive_b_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "Naive_B",
  density = b_density,
  win = WIN
)

memory_b_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "Memory_B",
  density = b_density,
  win = WIN
)

# T-Cell Branch
t_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(lymphoid_density), win=WIN)
t_density <- density.ppp(t_pp, safe_bw_diggle(t_pp))

CD4_t_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "CD4_T",
  density = t_density,
  win = WIN
)

CD8_t_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "CD8_T",
  density = t_density,
  win = WIN
)

memory_t_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "Memory_T",
  density = t_density,
  win = WIN
)

# NK-Cell Branch
nk_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(lymphoid_density), win = WIN)
nk_density <- density.ppp(nk_pp, safe_bw_diggle(nk_pp))

nk_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "NK",
  density = nk_density,
  win = WIN
)

```

### Myeloid Branch

```{r}
# ===================================
# Myeloid Branch
# ===================================

# Monocyte Branch
monocyte_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(myeloid_density), win = WIN)
monocyte_density <- density.ppp(monocyte_pp, safe_bw_diggle(monocyte_pp))

monocyte_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "Monocyte",
  density = monocyte_density,
  win = WIN
)


# Macrophage Branch
macrophage_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(myeloid_density), win = WIN)
macrophage_density <- density.ppp(macrophage_pp, safe_bw_diggle(macrophage_pp))

m1_like_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "M1_like",
  density = macrophage_density,
  win = WIN
)

m2_like_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "M2_like",
  density = macrophage_density,
  win = WIN
)


# Granulocyte Branch
granulocyte_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(myeloid_density), win = WIN)
granulocyte_density <- density.ppp(granulocyte_pp, safe_bw_diggle(granulocyte_pp))

neutrophil_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "Neutrophil",
  density = granulocyte_density,
  win = WIN
)

eosinophil_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "Eosinophil",
  density = granulocyte_density,
  win = WIN
)

basophil_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "Basophil",
  density = granulocyte_density,
  win = WIN
)


# Dendritic Branch
dendritic_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(myeloid_density), win = WIN)
dendritic_density <- density.ppp(dendritic_pp, safe_bw_diggle(dendritic_pp))

cdc1_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "cDC1",
  density = dendritic_density,
  win = WIN
)

cdc2_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "cDC2",
  density = dendritic_density,
  win = WIN
)

pdc_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "pDC",
  density = dendritic_density,
  win = WIN
)


# Mast Branch
mast_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(myeloid_density), win = WIN)
mast_density <- density.ppp(mast_pp, safe_bw_diggle(mast_pp))

mast_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "Mast",
  density = mast_density,
  win = WIN
)
```


## Stromal Layer

```{r}
# Stromal Layer
stromal_pp <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(main_density), win = WIN)
stromal_density <- density.ppp(stromal_pp, safe_bw_diggle(stromal_pp))

# Fibroblast Cells
fibroblast_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n=150,
  cell_subtype = "Fibroblast",
  density = stromal_density,
  win = WIN
)

# Endothelial Cells
endothelial_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n=150,
  cell_subtype = "Endothelial",
  density = stromal_density,
  win = WIN
)

# Pericyte Cells
pericyte_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n=150,
  cell_subtype = "Pericyte",
  density = stromal_density,
  win = WIN
)

# Combining them all
stromal_all <- bind_rows(
  fibroblast_cells,
  endothelial_cells,
  pericyte_cells
)
```


## Tissue Layer

```{r}
# Tissue Layer
tissue_pp  <- rpoint(n = 100, f = normalize_im(main_density), win = WIN)
tissue_density <- density.ppp(tissue_pp, safe_bw_diggle(tissue_pp))

# Epithelial Cells
epithelial_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(
  n = 150,
  cell_subtype = "Epithelial",
  density = tissue_density,
  win = WIN
)

tissue_all <- bind_rows(
  epithelial_cells
)
```

# Tie Things Together

```{r}
lymphoid_all <- bind_rows(
  naive_b_cells,
  memory_b_cells,
  CD4_t_cells,
  CD8_t_cells,
  memory_t_cells,
  nk_cells
)

myeloid_all <- bind_rows(
  monocyte_cells,
  m1_like_cells,
  m2_like_cells,
  neutrophil_cells,
  eosinophil_cells,
  basophil_cells,
  cdc1_cells,
  cdc2_cells,
  pdc_cells,
  mast_cells
)

immune_all <- bind_rows(
  lymphoid_all,
  myeloid_all
)

all_cells <- bind_rows(
  immune_all,
  stromal_all,
  tissue_all
) %>%
  add_tree_labels() %>%
  mutate(
    sample_id = "sample_1",
    condition = "control"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(all_cells, aes(x = x, y = y, colour = cellType_sub)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_bw()
```

# Let's try and add some signal

```{r}
all_cells_signal <- resimulate_celltype_with_mixture(
  all_cells = all_cells,
  target_type = "NK",
  partner_type = c("CD4_T", "CD8_T", "Memory_T"),
  weight = 0.7,
  win = WIN
)
```


```{r}
# --------------------------------------------------
# run_one_simulation()
#
# Purpose:
# Simulate one spatial sample using realistic cell
# counts and optional signal injection.
#
# Input:
#   sim_id        = sample identifier
#   win           = simulation window
#   condition     = condition label
#   add_signal    = logical, whether to add signal
#   signal_weight = strength of the added signal
#   total_cells   = total number of cells
#
# Output:
#   tibble containing all simulated cells
# --------------------------------------------------
run_one_simulation <- function(
  sim_id,
  win = WIN,
  condition = "control",
  add_signal = FALSE,
  signal_weight = 0.7,
  total_cells = 5000
) {

  counts <- make_realistic_counts(total_cells)

  # --------------------------------
  # Main scaffold
  # --------------------------------
  main_pp <- simulate_pp(
    n = choose_anchor_n(total_cells, min_n = 150, scale = 0.12, max_n = 500),
    win = win
  )
  main_density <- density.ppp(main_pp, safe_bw_diggle(main_pp))

  # --------------------------------
  # Top-level compartments
  # --------------------------------
  immune_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(counts$top["Immune"]),
    f = normalize_im(main_density),
    win = win
  )
  immune_density <- density.ppp(immune_pp, safe_bw_diggle(immune_pp))

  stromal_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(counts$top["Stromal"]),
    f = normalize_im(main_density),
    win = win
  )
  stromal_density <- density.ppp(stromal_pp, safe_bw_diggle(stromal_pp))

  tissue_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(counts$top["Tissue"]),
    f = normalize_im(main_density),
    win = win
  )
  tissue_density <- density.ppp(tissue_pp, safe_bw_diggle(tissue_pp))

  # --------------------------------
  # Immune sub-branches
  # --------------------------------
  lymphoid_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(counts$immune["Lymphoid"]),
    f = normalize_im(immune_density),
    win = win
  )
  lymphoid_density <- density.ppp(lymphoid_pp, safe_bw_diggle(lymphoid_pp))

  myeloid_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(counts$immune["Myeloid"]),
    f = normalize_im(immune_density),
    win = win
  )
  myeloid_density <- density.ppp(myeloid_pp, safe_bw_diggle(myeloid_pp))

  # --------------------------------
  # Lymphoid branch
  # --------------------------------
  b_total <- counts$leaf["Naive_B"] + counts$leaf["Memory_B"]
  b_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(b_total),
    f = normalize_im(lymphoid_density),
    win = win
  )
  b_density <- density.ppp(b_pp, safe_bw_diggle(b_pp))

  t_total <- counts$leaf["CD4_T"] + counts$leaf["CD8_T"] + counts$leaf["Memory_T"]
  t_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(t_total),
    f = normalize_im(lymphoid_density),
    win = win
  )
  t_density <- density.ppp(t_pp, safe_bw_diggle(t_pp))

  nk_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(counts$leaf["NK"]),
    f = normalize_im(lymphoid_density),
    win = win
  )
  nk_density <- density.ppp(nk_pp, safe_bw_diggle(nk_pp))

  naive_b_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Naive_B"], "Naive_B", b_density, win)
  memory_b_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Memory_B"], "Memory_B", b_density, win)

  CD4_t_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["CD4_T"], "CD4_T", t_density, win)
  CD8_t_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["CD8_T"], "CD8_T", t_density, win)
  memory_t_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Memory_T"], "Memory_T", t_density, win)

  nk_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["NK"], "NK", nk_density, win)

  lymphoid_all <- bind_rows(
    naive_b_cells,
    memory_b_cells,
    CD4_t_cells,
    CD8_t_cells,
    memory_t_cells,
    nk_cells
  )

  # --------------------------------
  # Myeloid branch
  # --------------------------------
  monocyte_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(counts$leaf["Monocyte"]),
    f = normalize_im(myeloid_density),
    win = win
  )
  monocyte_density <- density.ppp(monocyte_pp, safe_bw_diggle(monocyte_pp))
  monocyte_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Monocyte"], "Monocyte", monocyte_density, win)

  macrophage_total <- counts$leaf["M1_like"] + counts$leaf["M2_like"]
  macrophage_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(macrophage_total),
    f = normalize_im(myeloid_density),
    win = win
  )
  macrophage_density <- density.ppp(macrophage_pp, safe_bw_diggle(macrophage_pp))
  m1_like_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["M1_like"], "M1_like", macrophage_density, win)
  m2_like_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["M2_like"], "M2_like", macrophage_density, win)

  granulocyte_total <- counts$leaf["Neutrophil"] + counts$leaf["Eosinophil"] + counts$leaf["Basophil"]
  granulocyte_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(granulocyte_total),
    f = normalize_im(myeloid_density),
    win = win
  )
  granulocyte_density <- density.ppp(granulocyte_pp, safe_bw_diggle(granulocyte_pp))
  neutrophil_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Neutrophil"], "Neutrophil", granulocyte_density, win)
  eosinophil_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Eosinophil"], "Eosinophil", granulocyte_density, win)
  basophil_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Basophil"], "Basophil", granulocyte_density, win)

  dendritic_total <- counts$leaf["cDC1"] + counts$leaf["cDC2"] + counts$leaf["pDC"]
  dendritic_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(dendritic_total),
    f = normalize_im(myeloid_density),
    win = win
  )
  dendritic_density <- density.ppp(dendritic_pp, safe_bw_diggle(dendritic_pp))
  cdc1_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["cDC1"], "cDC1", dendritic_density, win)
  cdc2_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["cDC2"], "cDC2", dendritic_density, win)
  pdc_cells  <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["pDC"], "pDC", dendritic_density, win)

  mast_pp <- rpoint(
    n = choose_anchor_n(counts$leaf["Mast"]),
    f = normalize_im(myeloid_density),
    win = win
  )
  mast_density <- density.ppp(mast_pp, safe_bw_diggle(mast_pp))
  mast_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Mast"], "Mast", mast_density, win)

  myeloid_all <- bind_rows(
    monocyte_cells,
    m1_like_cells,
    m2_like_cells,
    neutrophil_cells,
    eosinophil_cells,
    basophil_cells,
    cdc1_cells,
    cdc2_cells,
    pdc_cells,
    mast_cells
  )

  # --------------------------------
  # Stromal
  # --------------------------------
  fibroblast_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Fibroblast"], "Fibroblast", stromal_density, win)
  endothelial_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Endothelial"], "Endothelial", stromal_density, win)
  pericyte_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Pericyte"], "Pericyte", stromal_density, win)

  stromal_all <- bind_rows(
    fibroblast_cells,
    endothelial_cells,
    pericyte_cells
  )

  # --------------------------------
  # Tissue
  # --------------------------------
  epithelial_cells <- simulate_cells_from_density(counts$leaf["Epithelial"], "Epithelial", tissue_density, win)
  tissue_all <- bind_rows(epithelial_cells)

  # --------------------------------
  # Combine
  # --------------------------------
  all_cells <- bind_rows(
    lymphoid_all,
    myeloid_all,
    stromal_all,
    tissue_all
  ) %>%
    add_tree_labels() %>%
    mutate(
      sample_id = paste0("sample_", sim_id),
      condition = condition
    )

  if (add_signal) {
    all_cells <- resimulate_celltype_with_mixture(
      all_cells = all_cells,
      target_type = "NK",
      partner_type = c("CD4_T", "CD8_T", "Memory_T"),
      weight = signal_weight,
      win = win,
      keep_metadata = FALSE
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        sample_id = paste0("sample_", sim_id),
        condition = condition
      )
  }

  all_cells
}
```

```{r}
control_list <- map(
  1:100,
  ~run_one_simulation(sim_id = .x, win = WIN, condition = "control", add_signal = FALSE)
)

treat_list <- map(
  1:100,
  ~run_one_simulation(sim_id = .x, win = WIN, condition = "signal", add_signal = TRUE)
)
```
